item.title: CTRLTube
item.description: A Chrome extension that helps learners stay focused on educational content by automatically filtering out non-educational YouTube videos. No more rabbit holes — just pure productivity.

item.title: Crypt.IT Website
item.description: A website for the capture the flag event 2024 of Byte Club

item.title: He Who Controls the Chips Controls the Future
item.description: The Case for Compute Governance, published by the NLIU Centre for Law and Technology.

item.title: Markets in Pieces
item.description: Arbitration, Competition Law, and the Quiet Erosion of Coherence, published by the Vidhi Centre for Legal Policy.

item.title: 1st Place, Essay Writing Competition on Arbitration and Policy
item.description: Kautilya Society, NLUO, 2025 — co-authored with Disha Joshi; subsequently published by Vidhi Centre for Legal Policy.

item.title: The Politics You Never Saw: Microtargeting and the Manufacture of Misinformed Voters
item.description: Chapter 2 in Headlines vs. Law: When Media Narratives Clash with Legal Truth, published by Swami Vivekananda University Press.

item.title: CS50AI, Harvard University
item.description: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Python, Harvard University (2025).

item.title: Language
item.description: Why Language Is the Hardest Thing We Pretended Was Easy - Notes on CS50AI Lecture 6

item.title: Neural Networks
item.description: Why Stacking Simple Things Starts Feeling Like Thought - Notes on CS50AI Lecture 5

item.title: Learning
item.description: Learning as Approximation, Mistake, and Slow Pattern Recognition - Notes on CS50AI Lecture 4

item.title: Optimization
item.description: Making the Best Choice When Perfection Is Too Expensive - Notes on CS50AI Lecture 3

item.title: Uncertainity
item.description: Deriving Results from Probabilities - Notes on CS50AI Lecture 2

item.title: Knowledge
item.description: Inferring and Creating Logic - Notes on CS50AI Lecture 1

item.title: Aditya Birla Scholarship, 2025 Shortlist
item.description: Selected among the Top 30 Law Students in India.

item.title: Search
item.description: Making Systems Find Paths - Notes on CS50AI Lecture 0

item.title: Best Educational Hack, KTByte Hackathon
item.description: International award at the KTByte Hackathon (2025).

item.title: Grade 2 Rock and Pop Guitar with Merit, Trinity College London
item.description: International certification awarded by Trinity College London (2024).

item.title: Soham Gupta
item.description: Student at GNLU Gandhinagar researching how technological change reshapes legal institutions.
